utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yes , yes it is . It is uh ... Every time on the lips ! Why ? ! Why on lips ? !

emotion_cause.span: 1_Every time on the lips ! Why ? ! Why on lips ? !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Here is Frannie . Hmm , will not she be happy to see me ?

emotion_cause.span: 2_Here is Frannie . Hmm , will not she be happy to see me ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Now wait a minute , you be nice ! All right ? I did not bring you here so you can ambush her .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I did not bring you here so you can ambush her .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Frannie was the one who found your Playboys and showed them to mom .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Am I doing here ? Why ? Surprised to see me ? Ross brought me . How do you like that ? !

emotion_cause.span: 9_You invite my brother , you invite my whole family , and not me ? !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You invite my brother , you invite my whole family , and not me ? !

emotion_cause.span: 9_You invite my brother , you invite my whole family , and not me ? !
9_You invite my brother , you invite my whole family , and not me ? !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: What ... Why would not you want me at your wedding ?

emotion_cause.span: 11_Why would not you want me at your wedding ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: What could I have possibly done ? !

emotion_cause.span: 11_Why would not you want me at your wedding ?

utterances.speaker: Frannie
utterances.text: I believe you know my husband .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: So it is really a question of who could you have possibly done .
